title: Apple’s Hide My Email feature has a bug that’s been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims
slides: Apple says Hide My Email protects you, but does it?
A researcher found real addresses leaking through the feature.
The bug exposes emails you thought were completely hidden.
Your private inbox could now receive unwanted contacts.
Check your forwarded emails today for unexpected leaks.
thread_text:
1. Apple’s promise, your risk

A researcher found real home addresses hidden inside forwarded emails from the Hide My Email feature.

2. The leak you didn’t see

Apple reroutes your mail through its servers, but a flaw sends your real address along as metadata.

3. What that means for you

Strangers can now find your private inbox and contact you directly, bypassing the mask entirely.

4. Not just spam at stake

Anyone with your real email can link it to your Apple ID and track your activity across sites.

5. Check your inbox now

Open any forwarded email from the past week and look for the full address in the headers. Seen it yet?
video_script: Apple said Hide My Email works. It doesn’t.
A researcher found real addresses leaking through.
Your hidden email reveals your personal inbox.
Unwanted contacts can now reach you directly.
Check your forwarded emails for unexpected leaks.

script: Apple said Hide My Email works. It doesn’t.
A researcher found real addresses leaking through.
Your hidden email reveals your personal inbox.
Unwanted contacts can now reach you directly.
Check your forwarded emails for unexpected leaks.

instagram.caption:
Your private email address could be sitting in the headers of every forwarded message you sent this week. 🫣

Apple’s Hide My Email feature has a bug that leaks your real address as metadata. A researcher found the flaw is exposing inboxes you thought were fully masked. 🕳️📧

Anyone with that leaked address can link it to your Apple ID and track your activity across sites. Bypassing the mask means zero privacy from spam or stalkers.

Open one forwarded email from the last 7 days right now—can you see your real address hiding in the headers? 👀
